hero.title: Sunita Thapa
hero.tagline: Data-driven SEO and digital marketing that grows organic traffic, boosts rankings and turns search intent into measurable revenue.

about.headline: I help brands get found by the right people at the right moment.
about.bio: I'm Sunita Thapa, an SEO Specialist and Digital Marketing Specialist based in Nepal. Over the last six years I've helped startups, local businesses and growing brands climb the search rankings and build marketing engines that actually convert. From technical SEO audits to full-funnel PPC and content strategy, my work is grounded in data, sharpened by testing, and measured by results.
about.philosophy: Good marketing isn't noise — it's relevance. I start with the searcher's intent, build the strategy around real data, and let results prove the approach. Trust and consistency are what turn traffic into customers.

expertise.title: Technical SEO
expertise.description: Site audits, crawl optimisation, schema and Core Web Vitals that lift rankings from the foundation up.

expertise.title: Content & Keyword Strategy
expertise.description: Topic clusters and intent-led content that earns rankings and keeps readers on the page.

expertise.title: Paid Search (PPC)
expertise.description: Google Ads campaigns engineered for a healthy ROAS, not just clicks.

expertise.title: Analytics & CRO
expertise.description: Tracking, dashboards and conversion-rate optimisation that turn traffic into revenue.

experience.description: Lead technical SEO and content strategy for e-commerce and SaaS clients across South Asia.
Ran paid and organic campaigns that doubled qualified leads for 30+ brands.
Built content operations and keyword systems for a national publishing network.

services.title: SEO Audit & Strategy
services.description: A full technical and content audit with a prioritised roadmap that fixes what's holding your rankings back.

services.title: On-Page & Technical SEO
services.description: Crawlability, Core Web Vitals, schema and internal linking — the foundation every ranking is built on.

services.title: Content Marketing
services.description: Intent-led content calendars and articles that rank, earn links and keep readers engaged.

services.title: PPC & Google Ads
services.description: Campaigns built around profitable keywords and tight tracking so every rupee is accountable.

services.title: Social Media Marketing
services.description: Scroll-stopping content and paid social that grow communities and start conversations.

services.title: Email & Automation
services.description: Welcome flows and newsletters that nurture subscribers into loyal, repeat customers.

portfolio.title: 3x Organic Traffic for a Kathmandu E-commerce Store
portfolio.excerpt: A technical overhaul and content cluster strategy that tripled organic sessions in eight months.
portfolio.content: We started with a deep crawl audit, fixed indexation and Core Web Vitals issues, then built topic clusters around high-intent commercial keywords. Within eight months organic sessions tripled and non-brand rankings reached page one for 120+ money keywords.

portfolio.title: Page-One Rankings for 120+ Local Keywords
portfolio.excerpt: A local SEO playbook that captured 'near me' searches for a multi-location brand.
portfolio.content: We optimised Google Business Profiles, built local landing pages and earned consistent review velocity. The brand now ranks page one for 120+ local-intent keywords and saw a 4x lift in map-pack visibility.

portfolio.title: 5.2x ROAS from a Revamped Google Ads Account
portfolio.excerpt: Restructuring a messy Search account into a profit engine with tight tracking.
portfolio.content: We rebuilt the account around profitable keyword themes, added offline conversion tracking and ran aggressive ad testing. ROAS climbed from 1.8x to 5.2x in a single quarter while CPA dropped 41%.

portfolio.title: Content Cluster That Earned 40+ Backlinks
portfolio.excerpt: A pillar-and-cluster content program that became the category reference.
portfolio.content: We mapped the topic landscape, published a data-led pillar page and supported it with 18 cluster articles. The hub earned 40+ organic backlinks and now drives a steady stream of assisted conversions.

portfolio.title: Social Launch That Grew a Community to 15k
portfolio.excerpt: A 90-day social content system that turned a quiet brand page into a community.
portfolio.content: We defined content pillars, shipped a consistent posting cadence and layered paid social on top of organic. The community grew to 15k engaged followers and contributed 22% of total inbound leads.

portfolio.title: Local SEO for a Chain of Wellness Clinics
portfolio.excerpt: Multi-location schema and review strategy that filled the appointment book.
portfolio.content: We implemented location-specific landing pages, fixed NAP consistency and built a review-generation flow. Bookings from organic search rose 68% across all clinics within two quarters.

portfolio.title: Shopping Campaigns That Cut Wasted Spend
portfolio.excerpt: Negative-keyword hygiene and feed optimisation that protected the budget.
portfolio.content: We rebuilt the Shopping feed, added granular negatives and aligned bidding to margin. Wasted spend dropped 35% while revenue from paid shopping rose 28%.

portfolio.title: Email Welcome Flow That Lifted Repeat Sales
portfolio.excerpt: A five-touch welcome sequence that turned first-time buyers into regulars.
portfolio.content: We designed a welcome flow built on behaviour triggers and clear CTAs. Repeat-purchase rate rose 24% in the first 60 days of launch.

blog.title: Local SEO in Nepal: The 2026 Playbook
blog.excerpt: A practical checklist for capturing 'near me' searches without a big agency budget.
blog.content: Local search keeps evolving, but the fundamentals are stubbornly consistent. This guide walks through Google Business Profile optimisation, review velocity, schema markup and the content gaps most local sites leave wide open — with templates you can ship this week.

blog.title: The difference between good SEO and invisible SEO
blog.excerpt: Rankings are the easy part. Keeping the reader is the craft.
blog.content: Too many marketers stop at the keyword. The real SEO skill is retention — creating content people finish, share and link to. I break down the on-page signals that actually matter in 2026.

blog.title: How to read a PPC account like a profit engine
blog.excerpt: Stop optimising for clicks. Start optimising for the metric that pays the bills.
blog.content: A short, opinionated take on restructuring Google Ads around profitable keywords and real conversion tracking — with three rewrites that lifted ROAS without raising the budget.
